response: The award won by only twelve people is the **EGOT** (Elsie G. Gower, Oscar, Tony, Grammy, and Emmy). The man who Ted Kooshian has performed with is **Marvin Hamlisch**, who is one of only two people (along with Richard Rodgers) to have won all four of the EGOT awards and a Pulitzer Prize. Therefore, the award won by only twelve people that Ted Kooshian has performed with is the **EGOT**.
